name: Costolette Di Vitello Al Cartoccio
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan. Sauté mushrooms for 3 minutes.
2. Add tomatoes, ham, wine, salt, and pepper to taste. Bring to a boil.
3. Lower the heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Season veal chops with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Heat olive oil in a skillet. Brown chops on both sides.
6. Cut four pieces of parchment paper large enough to completely wrap each chop.
7. Brush the paper with remaining oil. Place a chop in the center of each piece of parchment and cover with the sauce.
8. Sprinkle each chop with parsley. Fold over the paper, sealing the edges well.
9. Place on a baking sheet and bake at 375°F for 15 to 20 minutes.
10. Serve in the paper with the top rolled back. Note: You can place the parchment packages on a large wooden carving board and bring it to the table. Snip open the packages with scissors or carefully with a sharp knife, then remove the contents onto the dinner plate. Fried zucchini sticks pair well with this dish. Enjoy.
